    • When archetypal forces of nature are given the power to move our lives, amazing outcomes are guaranteed. Welcome to the saga of the 1975 Rancho Campo Bridgehouse.

      ---

      The Rancho Campo book is now available from Thoughtware Press !

      Radio Announcement

      3 Flyers Posted On Bulletin Boards At Health Food Stores, etc.

    • The Birth Of Rancho Campo Bridgehouse

      This is Clinton Callahan writing.

      In 1970, when I first registered to attend California Polytechnic State University (Cal Poly), I sat across from the lady at the registration desk as she says, "What would you like to study, young man?"

      No one ever asked me that before... so I take a risk and tell the truth. I say, "I want to learn to do real magic, transformation, alchemy, and healing. I want to learn psychic skills, Extra Sensory Perception, and astral projection. I want to study metaphysics, paraphysics..."

      "Hold on right there!" she blurts. "We have Physics!"

      I had attended two Physics classes in High School and liked doing the experiments. I shrug my shoulders and say, "Okay. I will study Physics."

      She is happy.

      Me? I am not so sure.

      After three years of classes it becomes infinitely clear that I am not learning what I want to learn. I feel frustrated, having no idea at the time what frustration is. Somehow I trust my inner struggle enough to let it lead me.

      It leads me to speak rather desperately with my two closest friends, Roger Taber and Phyllis Goldman, about framing up another possibility. Both agree that a new space of opportunity is wanted and needed for the students at Cal Poly San Luis Obispo, and more to the point, it is not too crazy to try.

      We design a strategy for how to open an invitation doorway for weekly meetings as a run-up to something bigger, having no clear plans for what the 'bigger' thing might be.

      In 1980, five years after our return, I compile my notes into a manuscript titled Seeds. Now it is titled: Rancho Campo: the first bridgehouse - an experiment in synergetic education and temporary community, and includes Phyllis Goldman's diary, plus photos that she made during our adventures.

      Rancho Campo is now published as a paperback or ebook by Thoughtware Press.

    • Photographic Herstory

      Here is a photographic 'herstory' of Rancho Campo Bridgehouse from 1975 in Baja California and mainland Mexico.

      We refer to these photographs as 'herstory' instead of 'history' becaue most of these photos were taken by Phyllis Goldman as her project for learning what she wanted to learn at Rancho Campo. Without Phyllis' enthusiasm for picture taking, these photos would not exist today.

      Phyllis shot in 35mm color slide film on a single-lens reflex camera. After the slides were developed they were projected a few times from slide carousels onto a screen for our friends, and then shoved into a closet at one place or another for over 45 years.

      In 2023, Clinton and Phyllis collaborated to have a selected batch of Phyllis' slides digitized so they could be shared with you here on this website.

    • Resources For Bridgehouses

      The Space determines what is Possible.

      The Context determines the Space.

      The Spaceholder determines the Context.

      Archiarchy is contexted in Radical Responsibility and centered on Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes.

      Anything that is not Regenerative is illegal.

    • Rancho Campo Bridgehouse Learnings

      WHAT WE WERE MISSING AT RANCHO CAMPO BRIDGEHOUSE

      You can look backwards with 20/20 vision to see what you could have done instead of what you did.

      But in the Present moment, all you can do is stay in Awe and Improvise.

      As Isaac Asimov says, "Success by planning alone is insufficient. One must improvise as well."

      Why must one intentionaly arrange to Improvise?

      Because success through following a known recipe brings with it a kind of deadness.

      Aliveness comes through Invention, but so do mistakes.

      We went ahead with Rancho Campo Bridgehouse even though we had never done anything like this before, and certainly did not know how to do it.

      One result was that upon our return to San Luis Obispo, California, we contact Susan Wellbanks, the woman who obtained permission for us to use her uncle's land in Baja California for Rancho Campo. We excitedy spread out a map and show Susan exactly where we set up Camp, but she starts laughing her head off. When she finally calms down enough to speak, she shakes her head and says, "You were nowhere near my uncle's property!"

      We are stunned. We set up Rancho Campo on the wrong piece of land!

      And... it turns out not to matter at all!

      This was a big lesson to learn.

      Back then, in 1975, we knew almost nothing of group dynamics:

      • We did not know about Torus Meeting Technology. We did not know about how to liberate group intelligence.
      • We did not know the Map Of Possibility or the difference between Low Drama and High Drama.
      • We did not know about Gremlin or Adult Egostate Contaminations.
      • We did not know about Resistance Decision Making, or the Purple Card.
      • We did not have the Distinctions between Feelings and Emotions.
      • We did not know about Box Technology.
      • We did not know about Matriarchy and Patriarchy and the emergence of Archiarchy.
      • We did not know that we were thinking with Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.).
      • We did not know about Conscious Feelings or how to navigate Emotional Healing Processes (EHP).
      • We did not know about Gameworlds, or about Cavitating, Holding, and Navigating Space.
      • But the ignorance that probably hurt us most was not knowing about the 4 Brains.

      Of the 5 participants, 3 were men. Guess which color brain was dominant for the men... Right. Blue. Logic. Reason. Concepts.

      One woman had a Red Brain dominant. Action. Reaction. Movement.

      The other woman had a Green Brain dominant. Connection. Community. Relating.

      The Blue and Red Brain people mostly thought that the Green Brain person was crazy, and vice versa.

      As a result of lack of awareness, we lost out on Green Brain intelligence in our Team.

      This is so sad to recount, and so sad to remember. I wish it would have been otherwise. I wish we knew how important all 4 Brain Colors are for healthy group interactions. We had all 4 Brain types present. We simply did not know how to elicit collaborative 4 Brain wisdom from our Team.

      Something that helped us tremendously that we did not know about at the time is Radical Freedom. Since each of us was on this expedition to learn about things we did not learn about in college, the context of our adventure was Radical Freedom.

      Fortunately, in our weekly meetings at the university before departing, we had already practiced being with others on their Quest for Radical Freedom. This built skills in the areas of asking real questions, being Radically Honest, making Discovery journeys, and engaging diverse ongoing Experiments. Then, when it came time for making Proposals during our Rancho Campo Bridgehouse, we were already connected with ourselves and with each other enough that Proposals came out easily. Our Team could say what they wanted.

      This way we could make plans, solve problems, and enact choices as a Team without delay or confusion. We ended up working together like a well-oiled discovery and transformation machine. This was the delight. This was also what brought unspeakably great sadness when we each went our distinct and separate ways into our futures.

      LETTER FROM ALAN FRIEDMAN 5 MARCH 2024 - 49 YEARS AFTER RANCHO CAMPO

      Hi Clinton!

      Delighted to hear your phone message when we got home late last night.

      Is this mind-reading? Serendipity? Or that acronym I can't remember? (E.C.C.O.) I thought about you a lot last week.

      Life is wonderful, AND also lots of time-stress. I spend lots of time on senior-care, disabled neighbors, babysitting two granddaughters, house repairs, rental house repairs, caring for almond farm properties, gardening, visiting Nature, attending Sonoma State University lectures, helping others, and lots more. We are 'Overwhelmed with abundance!'

      Barbara's mother, Betty Jean Lendrum, just died on leap-year day, at the age of 96. She was in senior centers for 9 years (Rohnert Park) & hospice care (Petaluma) for 16 months, and we recently told Barbara's siblings that death might be soon. They visited from Oregon, Montana, & Alaska, until Feb 28. Perfect timing.

      People keep consoling our 'sorrow', and I respond that, "We all die someday, and I am joyous for her happy, healthy 96 years." Some family members have angrily scolded me for such a perspective. Such 'attacks' remind me of Lee Lozowick giving 'hormetic' eustress gifts to students by pretending to 'attack' them. I am 'an anthropologist from Mars', consciously observing their reactions and my emotions.

      We spent the last 3 days emptying Betty's room. When you phoned, we were delivering Betty's furniture to Barbara's sister in Vallejo. I also repaired her fence that was blown down by unusually violent winds. Last week I repaired two other fences, at two neighbors, that were knocked over by the same hard winds. I'm optimistically grateful that I have the health, strength, and skills for such work.

      Today I bicycled to SSU twice, in the rain, to attend 3 lectures. It's a delightful ride through Nature alongside Copeland Creek. After locking the bike, I walk past 14 students: 9 are looking at their phone screens, 2 are talking on their phones, and only 3 lacked obvious phones - tho they likely wore ear buds. I label this as a 'phony society'. Also plenty of students in wheelchairs, which would have been classified as significant before 2020 and is now much more common to see after their mandatory mRNA covax (though almost nobody sees any health correlation nor honest science about the COVID vaccinations).

      I capitalize Nature {&Earth &Attention &Life}, call it 'Vitamin N', point out 'Nature Deficit Disorder', and prefer to spend
      most time outside instead of hiding in a 'cave' with technology. Hence I have not yet had very much impact via online, tho I do post comments. I mostly avoid social media, and I worry about addiction to modern technologies and arising technologies like artificial intelligence.

      My impact is more one-to-one and alone (e.g. growing organic food). I 'forgive' myself by recalling Mahatma Gandhi's quote "You must be the change you wish to see in the world." Another quote that comes to mind is "Our greatest ability as humans is not to change the world, but to change ourselves." Lots of good quotes by him about Life and impact.

      When giving advice, I remember, "I should not say 'should'." Instead I suggest 'choice', so that any concept is an internal choice instead of an external command.

      With ~100 emails/day, I have to search them. I had failed to notice your email from Bali because I searched for Callahan instead of nextculture. Finally found it last night, clicked on the two links, and spent nearly 4 hours exploring them. Delightful! You are substantially awakening many spirits!

      Sounds like Anne-Chloé is also contributing large, positive impact. Please share this with her if it seems appropriate to do so. (Might be too wordy?)

      You show lots of wonderful photos on the website of Baja, cactus, beaches, sunsets, & more! I gotta buy your new books. (At
      least for me, first, then perhaps for our town's public library.)

      'Rancho Campo Bridgehouse' and the 1975 meetings certainly had a major impact on my Life!

      Your word 'Herstory' reminds me of the words you invented 49 years ago, like 'hesh' for he/she, 'hes' for hers/his, 'hem' for her/him. Only the last handful of years are many people now often searching for non-gender words.

      I see, and share, your ongoing concern with climate change. I also interact with people who disbelieve it. I suspect that at least some of their disbelief arises from some awareness of how it is being dishonestly used for profits. I call that 'Greenwashing' and hope to someday create a website clarifying the distinction. My analogy is, "Let's rip out the Amazon Rain Forest and replace it with solar panels to stop climate change., which could also earn giga-dollars in 'carbon credits'!"

      Just before PG&E shifted California politics for their profit last April 2023, I studied our electricity bills that have gone up 392% in 15 years and calculated that solar panels generating 173% of our usage rate would pay for themselves in less than 8.3 years (not even counting gas furnace & water heater elimination). So we shifted our house to solar power without batteries. Analogous to owning our home, now we own our power instead of 'renting' it (and will avoid the huge inflation that seems very likely soon).

      I spoke to dozens of people from a handful of solar companies, and none of them had ever even heard of the carbon footprint of solar panels, nor the environmental, ethical, & slave/child labor in mining lithium & cobalt for short-life lithium-ion batteries. They just blindly assume 'all solar is good'.

      To prepare for solar, we first re-roofed our house, and none of the roofing companies had ever heard of nor even understood the concept of infrared reflectivity to reduce global warming. Most modern Homo sapiens are ignorant puppets of the 'corporate profit empire'.

      I like to say, "Listen to everyone and do not blindly believe anyone."

      I only know that I do not know.

      Well, that's probably more than enough for now . . .

      Now I have to study the ballot to intelligently vote tomorrow.

      Nature, or God, grants me countless gifts every moment of my Life! {I just need a time machine.}

      With Love,

      Alan

    • Afterwards

      50 years later... 1975-2025

      On 19 September 2025, Phyllis Goldman wrote:

      Hello Alan, Roger, and Clinton, dear friends of many years,

      I just finished reading Rancho Campo: the first Bridgehouse a few days ago. I laughed and cried openly during the entire book, mostly for our day-to-day experiences and connections.

      It hit me hard, I felt so much joy and sadness... and I wondered why we never met again in this context… and more so, why we lost touch with others involved, especially Ed Clark and Kat Felkner.

      Why didn’t any of us suggest that we all fly back to Cabo San Lucas together to visit our dear neighbors there, especially Adelfa and Fernando Gastelum.

      I know you visited them Clinton, in 1976. And I tried unsuccessfully once. But together we could have brought them pictures, a reconnection, and expresseed our appreciation of all they so lovingly offered us.

      That said, I ask you three, Alan, Roger, and Clinton... are you interested in gathering for a weekend, or a few days? Clinton I think you will be in the USA soon? I am happy to host you all here in Eugene, Oregon, with room to stay, or we could meet closer to Alan and Roger in California.

      Or we can have a zoom call together at the very least. What do you think and feel about this proposal?

      Love, Phyllis

      On 22 October 2025, Roger Taber wrote:

      Dear Phyllis (and All),

      I have recently been reading Rancho Campo and have finally caught up to the 50 year mark in your journal (from 21 October 1975). I am thoroughly impressed with your style of writing and your photos. I know I have seen these photos before, and have certainly corresponded numerous times with you over the past 50+ years, but I guess I never fully appreciated how good your writing is. Your journal contains all the elements of a great adventure novel, along with humor and insight.

      And then there is the adventure itself. What a journey! You guys are champions.

      I knew you had some challenges but nothing like you describe. You come out like heroes each time.

      I look forward to finishing the book.

      Love, Roger

      On 26 October 2025, the Rancho Campo Team had a joyous online reunion. Deeply touched by this opportunity to reconnect, exuberhantly joyous, we swapped stories and legends spanning 50 years, asking questions about unsolved mysteries, and reporting endless adventures that recently culminated in the release of the Rancho Campo book from Thoughtware Press.

      Marriages, divorces, births of children and grandchildren, deaths of parents and siblings, our shared journeys span all continents of the world. Both Phyllis and Roger became extraordinary teachers in highschools, Phyllis in special education, teaching about new relationships with rage, and Roger introducing so many young people to the sciences in his inimitablely enthusiastic and innovative ways.

      Alan and Clinton even joined forces for a while to develop and manufacture one of the world's first computer-controlled Polymerase Chain Reaction thermal cyclers - yes, the infamous 'PCR' machine to make the DNA tests required during COVID times.

      Numerous Bridgehouses are continually forming with participants from around the world. They thrive in the same Radical Freedom as Rancho Campo, using the Bridgehouse traditions that create synergetic education and temporary community.

      Perhaps a Bridgehouse would serve you on your Path towards the regenerative, nonhierarchical, authentic adulthood initiation centered, nonmaterial value, radical responsibility culture of Archiarchy.

      We look forward to hearing from you!

    • Bridgehouse Preparation Experiments

      No one can experiment for you.

      More interestingly, no one can stop you from experimenting.

      Experimenting builds Matrix for collecting more consciousness.

      With more consciousness, you see more options to choose from, including the frightening ones.

      What you decide, however, is still up to you.

      MAKE A DEEP DIVE INTO UNDERSTANDING THE BRIDGEHOUSE CONTEXT AND PURPOSE SO THAT YOU NATURALLY SOURCE IT IN YOUR LIFE

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.01

      After listing 20 different Bridgehouse Distinctions in your Beep! Book, please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.01 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please write the most profound Bridgehouse Distinction you discovered in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      LEARN TO S.C.U.B.A. DIVE INTO YOUR OWN HEART AND BE-WITH OTHER PEOPLE USING ABSURD LEVELS OF EFFECTIVENESS FROM HEART GYM

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.02

      Create a 3Cell Team to go on this deep dive adventure with you as your Discovery Team. Participate in HeartGym daily for 3 months together.

      Draw an Energetic Map of your Inner Territory in your Beep! Book and take a photo of it on your website. Then please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.02 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please give a link to the photo of your Inner Map in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      EXTENSIVELY EXPAND YOUR BOX TO DIFFERENTIATE BETWEEN THE 4 FEELINGS AND THE 4 EMOTIONS AND BECOME EXPERT IN COMMUNICATING YOUR FEELINGS AND EMOTIONS

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.03

      Study to learn about your Box's Survival Strategy in the Box Technology website.

      Switch from Verbal Reality to Experiential Reality.

      Lower your Numbness Bar.

      Practice experientially distinguishing between your 4 Emotions and your 4 Feelings.

      Practice Radical Relating with your 4 Emotions and your 4 Feelings until you can both listen to other people's Emotions and Feelings, and effectively communicate your own Emotiona and your own Feelings. Use your Emotions for healing things. Use your Feelings for handling things.

      Please list in your Beep! Book 13 different distinctions about Feelings and Emotions. Please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.03 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

      GIVE A WORKTALK TO SHARE THE NEARLY MAGICAL HEALING AND TRANSFORMATIONAL POWERS OF MAKING COMPLETION LOOPS

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.04

      Learn to effectively deliver Completion Loops in your daily communications.

      After you have become proficient, deliver a WorkTalk to explain and demonstrate Completion Loops so the participants can begin practicing upgraded thoughtware in their communications. Discover adult communication power.

      Please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.04 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please write the feeling you express the least in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 4 Matrix Points.

      BECOME EXPERT IN 7 TECHNOPENURIAPHOBIA SKILLS TO USE AS STEPPING STONES ON THE BRIDGE FROM PATRIARCHY TO ARCHIARCHY DURING THOSE TIMES WHEN THERE IS NOTHING

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.05

      Study the impact of Technopenuriaphobia in modern culture lives.

      Select which Technopenuriaphobia healing skills you will learn.

      Learn 7 new Technopenuriaphobia healing skills, either your children, or your friends.

      Please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.05 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please write the 7 skills you learn in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

      DISCOVER AND EXPLORE ARCHIARCHY UNTIL YOU CAN INHABIT IT AS YOUR NEW HOME AND CAN EXPLAIN IT ATTRACTIVELY TO OTHERS

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.06

      Discover Archiarchy. Become Archan. Prove it in your daily life.

      Please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.06 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please write 6 words about Archiarchy in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 6 Matrix Points.

      GO ONLINE AND STUDY THE STRENGTH OF VARIOUS MATERIALS AND LEARN SIMPLE FIRST-AID TECHNIQUES TO BUILD ACCURACY INTO YOUR COMPASS OF REALITY

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.07

      Please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.07 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please write the name of your First-Aid instructor in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      GIVE A WORKTALK ABOUT HOW TO CAVITATE NEW SPACE FOR ARCHIARCHY WITH CONTEXT AND DISTINCTIONS THAT BRING PEOPLE NEW AGENCY

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.08

      Learn to proficiently Cavitate Space.

      Learn to Set the Context of Archiarchy in the Spaces you Cavitate.

      Give the WorkTalk, either online or in person about the amazingly delightful possibility of Cavitating newly contexted space to live in.

      Also talk about how Cavitating Space is the basis of becoming a Person of Agency.

      Make sure you record your WorkTalk and post it online.

      Please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.08 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please give the link to the recording of your WorkTalk in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 8 Matrix Points.

      GO THROUGH RAGE CLUB SPACEHOLDER TRAINING AND USE IT TO DELIVER YOUR NONMATERIAL VALUE SO MUCH THAT YOU CAN EMPOWER OTHERS TO QUIT THEIR CORPORATE JOB

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.09

      Go to Heart Gym online or in-person for at least 3 weeks, 5 days per week.

      Go through at least one online or in-person Rage Club.

      Go through at least one online or in-person Rage Club Spaceholder Training.

      Use your Conscious Anger to make possibilities to deliver your Nonmaterial Value. Learn to deliver your Nonmaterial Value so well that you do not have time to go to your corporate job anymore.

      Learn to empower others to take back their Authority with their Conscious Anger enough that they too can deliver their Nonmaterial Value and quit their corporate job.

      Please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.09 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please write the name of your Rage Club Spaceholder trainers in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 9 Matrix Points.

      USE THE CLARITY OF YOUR EXPERIENTIAL RAGE TO SAY WHAT YOU WANT AND WHAT YOU DON'T WANT TO MAKE THE PATH CLEAR FOR YOU TO CREATE OR CO-HABIT A BRIDGEHOUSE

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.10

      Learn to Say What You Want in your personal and professional relations.

      After listing 20 different conversations where you have said what you want or what you don't want in your Beep! Book, please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.10 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Write one thing that you want in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 10 Matrix Points.

      ONGOINGLY NEGOTIATE CONSCIOUS COLLABORATIONS AS A PROCEDURE FOR BUILDING OUT THE CULTURE IN WHICH YOU WOULD LOVE TO LIVE

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.11

      Learn to Negotiate Intimacy as a building block basis skill for inventing and inhabiting the memetic infrastructure of the culture you would love to live in. To what degree is your invented culture in resonance with the regenerative adulthood-initiation-centered radical-responsibility thoughtware-upgraded culture of Archiarchy?

      After listing 20 different conversations where you have Negotiated Intimacy in your Beep! Book, please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.00 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please give a link to a photo of one of your successfully negotiated intimacy experiences in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 11 Matrix Points.

      DOWN SIZE YOUR LIFE AND OFFLOAD BAGGAGE ON YOUR WAY TO RADICAL SIMPLICITY WITH REGARDS TO ENERGETIC ENTANGLEMENTS WITH OTHER PEOPLE AND THE MATERIAL WORLD

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.12

      Create a Study Group to read through the book Voluntary Simplicity: toward a way of life that is outwardly simple, inwardly rich, by Duane Elgin.

      Learn to deliver the Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) for each other that bring you through your fears and rages and grief to a new empowerment through Radical Simplicity. Consider living this way the rest of your life.

      List 12 conflicting conversations and energetic entanglements that you have untangled in your Beep! Book. Please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.12 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please give a link to the photo of your Beep! Book page with the list of disentanglements in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 12 Matrix Points.

      LEAVE BEHIND THE PRISON PLACENTA THAT INTERFACED YOU TO THE WORLD FOR YOUR ENTIRE LIFETIME SO THAT YOU CAN BREATHE FRESH AIR AS FUEL FOR YOUR FUTURE CREATIONS

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.13

      Study to learn about the 8 Prisons you are stuck inside blocking you from becoming yourself as an adult.

      Start a Possibility Team to support each other to go through whatever it takes to enter Radical Freedom. Head out into the world on your journey of Radical Freedom to see what is really there and what is really going on.

      Expand your website to show photos of the people you meet and the experiences you discover in your Radical Freedom lifestyle, then, please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.13 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please give the link to your web page in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 13 Matrix Points.

      FIND YOUR IDENTITY AS A NOMAD TO THE DEGREE THAT WHEN SOMEONE ASKS, "WHERE DO YOU LIVE?", YOU CAN TRUTHFULLY SAY, "HERE", AND WHEN THEY ASK, "WHERE IS YOUR STUFF?" YOU CAN SAY, "HERE", AND FEEL QUITE CONTENT WITH THAT

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.14

      Learn the skills of Nomading until you find a circle of friends and make a Growness that could eventually become a nomadic Nanonation.

      Video a WorkTalk you give about the possibility of living a more Archan Nomadic lifestyle. Please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.14 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please give the link to your video in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 14 Matrix Points.

      FOCUS YOUR INTENTIONS ON LIBERATING YOUR NONMATERIAL VALUE CREATION AND DELIVERY SKILLS TO SUCH AN ASTONISHING PRODUCTIVITY SO THAT IT FEEDS YOU AND YOUR VILLAGE

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.15

      Deliver Workshops and WorkTalks and write Articles about how your participants can enliven their Nonmaterial Value. Along the way, prove the value of this in your daily life, for example, by giving demonstrations of Memetic Engineering or Emotional Healing Processes (EHP). Provide Nonmaterial Value that has more value than money can pay for.

      After increasing your Nonmaterial Value delivery skills to double your previous capacity, please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.15 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please write the name of your toughest Client in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 15 Matrix Points.

      LEARN TO DEPEND ON THE NONMATERIAL VALUE CREATED BY OTHERS IN YOUR VILLAGE AND EXCHANGED AND EXPANDED DURING YOUR TORUS TECHNOLOGY MEETINGS: UPGRADE BOTH YOUR THOUGHTWARE AND SKILLS

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.16

      Learn and practice the thoughtware and tools of Torus Technology for your Possibility Team or your Growness. Be sure you include the Purple Card and Resistance Decision Making.

      After developing 70% efficiency of delivering your Nonmaterial Value to your Torus, please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.16 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please write your favorite Torus Technology in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 16 Matrix Points.

      CELEBRATE THE PRECISION AND INTENSITY OF ARCHAN RELATING DURING YOUR ONGOING INTERACTIONS IN YOUR DAILY LIFE

      Matrix Code BHRANCHO.17

      In your Possibility Team or Growness, practice Archan Relating until you do not ever want to stop.

      Give a WorkTalk on 3 of the Archan Relating Skills you are practicing.

      Invite 15-30 people to a 3 hour Archan Relating Skills Party at your house. Start by deliveing a 30-minute context-setting and Q&A space.

      After listing 17 skills to develop for Archan Relating in your Beep! Book, please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.17 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Please give the link to a photo from your Archan Relating Party in the Proof field. This Experiment is worth 17 Matrix Points.

      BRING HIGH LEVEL FUN TO YOUR ALIVENESS IN EACH BREATH SO THAT YOUR THE OPPORTUNITIES AND GIFTS OF YOUR LIFE ARE FULLY UTILIZED AND CELEBRATED

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.18

      Research High Level Fun in your Possibility Team or Growness. Practice originating spaces of High Level Fun in your personal, relational, and professional worlds.

      After the third full hour of enduring the intensity of High Level Fun without letting yours or anyone else's Gremlin destroy the Space, please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.18 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 18 Matrix Points.

      ORIGINATE A GROWNESS FOR 3 TO 8 PEOPLE AROUND CREATING WHAT EACH OF YOU WANTS TO EXPERIENCE IN THE WORLD

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.19

      Use your Growness to bring to life a culture that you would love to live in with people you would love to live with in your Archan Village. The Growness is your squad, your team, your circle, your gang, your source of possibility and agency.

      After the third full month of having High Level Fun co-creating your Growness with your Team without letting anyone's Gremlin destroy the Space, please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.19 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Write the name of your Growness in the PROOF field. This Experiment is worth 19 Matrix Points.

      CREATE AND NAVIGATE A WEEKLY STUDY GROUP FOR THE BOOK: RANCHO CAMPO: the first Bridgehouse

      Matrix Code RANCHOCA.20

      You can grab the Rancho Campo book from Thoughtware Press or any online bookshop.

      Your weekly Study Group can be online or in person. Do not worry about not knowing answers to all the questions which might come up for people. Instead, use Torus Intelligence to support each other generously along this journey. Consider co-creating a Rancho-Campo-like experience for yourself and your Team.

      After reading through the whole book together, please register Matrix Code RANCHOCA.20 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 20 Matrix Points.

    • StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayeronline-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate yourpoint of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what youthink about. Your thoughtware is what you useto think with. When you change your thoughtware,you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring uptransformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade yourthoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points wewill change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading thiswhole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code RANCHOCA.00 to log yourMatrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!
